Coconino Productions

Helping Humans Grow & Play

An independent animation studio. We write, design, voice, score, animate and cut every frame ourselves, and render it on our own machines.

See the work  → Work with us

Click the forest. He has been waiting all night.

The work

We make things
that move.

Series, shorts, music, worlds. Some of it is for kids. Some of it is not. What every project shares is that it is made end to end under one roof, by people who care what it looks like at 2am.

Series · out now

Techno Crab

Our animated series for young audiences. Original songs, full episodes, and real science hidden inside the silliness. Buoyancy, gravity, navigating by the stars.

In production

The Moon Mission

A crew builds a rocket on a coral atoll and flies it to the Moon. Newton's third law, booster staging, why you float, and why a spacewalk is completely silent.

Broadcast · live

The Always‑On Channel

A 24/7 broadcast of everything we have made. New work joins the stream automatically the moment it is released.

How we work

Every frame,
under one roof.

Story, cast design, voice, score, animation, sound and edit, then rendered on our own GPUs, in our own living room. No outsourcing, no stock, and no shortcuts we would be embarrassed to explain to a five‑year‑old.

Storyscripts and research
Castlocked character design
Soundvoice, score, foley
Renderon our own GPUs

“In house” is not a figure of speech. It is a house. Los Angeles, California.

The studio

We named it
after the dog.

He was manifested in the Coconino National Forest. Some time later and a long way from those pines, a mother doberman had a litter, and one of those puppies turned out to be him.

He loves the moon, coyotes, squirrels, and jumping in the pool. All four are in the forest above, if you wait for them.

Contact

Say hello.

We are a small studio and we read everything. Commissions, co‑production, press, festivals, or just to tell us your four‑year‑old sings the crab song in the bath.
